prompt: Aerial view of a small cluster of dense, lush green trees at the center, surrounded by bare leafless dying trees and enveloping fog, with a city visible in the distant background at golden hour. No text, no labels, no axes. Cinematic, melancholic, drone photography style.
dataset_name: Global Forest Watch — Primary Tropical Forest Loss 2023
insight: The world lost 4.1 million hectares of primary tropical forest in 2023, leaving surviving forests as isolated islands surrounded by degradation and encroaching urbanization.
